// Legacy ProffieOS — LocalizedClash + Lockup + BlastFadeout + OnSpark + HumpFlicker stack
// Demonstrates Lockup<basecolor,blast_overlay,lockup_color,lightning_color> chained
// with LocalizedClash positioning on impact + BlastFadeout decay
StylePtr<InOutHelper<LocalizedClash<Lockup<BlastFadeout<OnSpark<HumpFlicker<Black,Blue,5>,White,200>,White,200>,AudioFlicker<Blue,White>,AudioFlicker<Green,White>>,White>,300,800>>()
